name: SignPath for Open Source Projects
description: Open-source projects can apply for a free code signing certificate through the SignPath Foundation, with secure signing, pipeline integrity, and full audit trails at no cost.

perks.title: Free Code Signing Certificate
perks.description: Sponsored code signing certificate for open-source projects at no cost through the SignPath Foundation.

perks.title: Pipeline Integrity
perks.description: Source and build provenance verification, policy enforcement, and protection against compromised pipelines with CI/CD-native connectors.

perks.title: Format-Aware Signing
perks.description: Deep signing support for EXE, MSI, JAR, XML, Docker, Office Macros, and nested artifacts.

perks.title: Automatic Audit Trails
perks.description: Detailed logs tracking every signed artifact for auditors and regulatory compliance reporting.

eligibility: Must be an open-source project with a publicly available codebase.
Must use a recognized open-source license.
applicationProcess: Apply through the SignPath open-source community page.
